category_sources: Official Mail Deduplicate README describes an mdedup CLI utility for deduplicating mail from boxes.
source_facts.description: CLI to deduplicate mails from mail boxes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mail-deduplicate; official documentation title and GitHub repository identify the project as Mail Deduplicate.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation site for Mail Deduplicate.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Mail Deduplicate docs and GitHub search result point to kdeldycke/mail-deduplicate as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it deduplicates mails from mail boxes; official README lists mailbox formats including mbox and maildir.
